priority_actions.why: Market movement and no-vig probability are required comparison baselines; missing movement makes edge quality harder to audit.

priority_actions.action: Backfill lineup and top-order hitting context
priority_actions.why: Lineup quality materially changes team strength and should not be silently represented as zero.
Starting pitcher features are high-leverage MLB predictors and are currently sparse or all-zero.
Bullpen workload and availability affect late-game win probability and need source-level freshness.

priority_actions.action: Keep missing flags separate from numeric zeros
priority_actions.why: Do not let source_missing become numeric zero; preserve missingness as explicit model information.

interpretation.source_missing: The upstream data source or historical backfill is absent; do not treat the zero as a real baseball value.
interpretation.true_zero_or_context_sparse: The zero may be valid because the condition often does not occur, but it still needs freshness checks.
interpretation.feature_disabled_with_signal: The feature has some non-zero coverage but remains excluded from active model training until governance promotion evidence exists.
interpretation.active_core_healthy: The feature is currently allowed in the active model and has acceptable coverage.
